artifact_classification: authoritative Step 14 UV interpretation; not source evidence and not an implemented UV layout
decision: Use one unique 0-1 UV0 layout with face ownership routed to five normal-owner source views or to an authored hidden/transition zone; use one separate non-overlapping UV1 lightmap layout.

uv0.name: UVMap
uv0.domain: closed 0-1 with all sampling footprints and dilation contained inside the atlas
uv0.atlas_coordinate_convention: zero-based integer texels; x right, y down; half-open rectangles
uv0.source_ingest_filter: nearest/point only; no resize or raster warp

face_owner_rule.visible_face_test: approved source-visible authority group and not fully occluded in the matching depth-tested owner view
face_owner_rule.top: +Z when positive n_z is strictly dominant over abs(n_x) and abs(n_y)
face_owner_rule.front: -Y when abs(n_y) dominates and n_y is negative
face_owner_rule.back: +Y when abs(n_y) dominates and n_y is positive
face_owner_rule.left: -X when abs(n_x) dominates and n_x is negative
face_owner_rule.right: +X when abs(n_x) dominates and n_x is positive
face_owner_rule.cardinal_ties: use the already approved R7 predecessor/successor branches and R9 endpoint-selector coupling; successor owns exact midpoint ties
face_owner_rule.top_ties: +Z owns a positive-Z exact dominance tie; this is texture routing only

component_face_routing.visible_owner_method: normal-owner rule; VAG-004 routes to top
component_face_routing.seams: component boundary, hidden-contact loop, top-cap boundary, and every cardinal/top owner transition
component boundary, both hidden-contact loops, and every owner transition
component boundary, both hidden-contact loops, and every owner transition

visible_groups: VAG-012-C004-FINAL-FIRST-CLOSURE-FACE at z bands 0-5 and 5-10 cm
component_face_routing.visible_owner_method: normal-owner rule with +Z dominance permitted on upward-facing apron sectors
component_face_routing.seams: component boundary, Z=0 underside boundary, hidden CL-003 loop, technical final/first closure, and every owner transition

uv0.source_window_policy: Only mask-owned source RGB pixels are copied into these fixed windows. Unowned pixels inside a window and every texel in the authored zone are interpreted continuation, dilation, or unused padding.
uv0.projection_policy: Step 15 may move UV vertices over a native source window to align an owner face with source appearance, but may not move, warp, resize, or filter the source raster. UV placement is explicitly interpreted consumer mapping and not a physical source-to-target transform.
uv0.projection_failure_policy: Any positive-area overlap, out-of-window sampling, unowned background sample, or source-owner mismatch blocks Step 15. Do not repair by moving source pixels or changing geometry.
